title: Plate Pack
description: This pack simply turns item frames into dinner plates.
body:
# Plate Pack

### About

A simple resource pack that turns item frames into dinner plates! Use this if you have no good way to make a nice plate to put your food on in minecraft.

### Tips

- If you don't want all your item frames to be plates, use glow item frames as they are uneffected by the pack.
  
- Put one or two plates on one or two open fence gates to make a nice table!

### Installation
Installed just like any other resource pack. A tutorial on how to do that can be found on the minecraft wiki [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Loading_a_resource_pack).
  
### Required Mods

None! This pack works in total vanilla minecraft.

### Sources
- **[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/plate-pack/)**
- **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/plate-pack)**
